revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Text replacement - "市町村別" to " by Municipality"
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Merge [[Category:宮崎県の建築物 ( by Municipality)]] into [[Category:Buildings in Miyazaki Prefecture (by Municipality)]] via bot
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[宮崎県]][[高原町]]内にある[[建築物]]に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:たかはるちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{citation needed|たかはるちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:高原町の建築物]]}} {{translated page|ja|Category:高原町の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:高原町の建築物|version=61586814}} [[Category:Buildings in Miyazaki Prefecture (by Municipality)]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Takaharu, Miyazaki]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[ja:Category:高原町の建築物]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Sano Shrine]] [[sn:高原町の建築物]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

[[ja:Category:高原町の建築物]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Sano Shrine]] [[sn:高原町の建築物]] {{Wikidata link|Q27674156}} [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] [[Category:Buildings in Miyazaki Prefecture (by Municipality)]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Takaharu, Miyazaki]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "ategories missing wikidata" to "qq"
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[宮崎県]][[高原町]]内にある[[Building]]sに関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:たかはるちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|たかはるちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:高原町の建築物}} {{translated page|ja|Category:高原町の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:高原町の建築物|version=61586814}}
[[ja:Category:高原町の建築物]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Sano Shrine]] [[sn:高原町の建築物]] {{Wikidata link|Q27674156}} [[Category:cqq]]
[[Category:cqq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] [[Category:Buildings in Miyazaki Prefecture (by Municipality)]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Takaharu, Miyazaki]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q27674156)
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Cqq]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{デフォルトソート:たかはるちようのけんちくふつ}}
